visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with thinning hair and glasses, wearing a dark suit and a white collared shirt. He has a serious and slightly concerned expression as he looks off-camera. The background is a soft, out-of-focus green and beige, suggesting an indoor environment. The audio features a man speaking in a calm but firm and slightly dismissive tone. He begins with a definitive "No, sir," before explaining with a matter-of-fact, almost condescending voice, "That's a silk cocoon. There's no way that could get way down in there." His delivery is steady and confident, as if he is an expert dismissing an implausible idea. The camera cuts to an extreme close-up of a pair of hands. One hand holds a small, clear glass jar. The other hand uses a pair of metal tweezers to carefully place a dark, textured object, resembling a silkworm cocoon, into the opening of the jar. In the blurred background, the face of a woman with dark hair is visible, watching the action. The shot remains a tight close-up on the hands and the jar. The tweezers are no longer in use, and the hand holding the jar moves it slightly. The woman in the background
